output: powershell.exe Get-ADUser -Filter * | Select Name, SamAccountName | Out-File C:\Lab\out\users.txt
explanation: Reordering: The command line reorders the arguments to avoid the suspicious string match on ' > ' or ' | Select ' by using explicit pipeline and output redirection.

output: pwsh.exe Get-ADUser -Filter * | Select Name, SamAccountName | Out-File C:\Lab\out\users.txt
explanation: Substitution: Replaced 'powershell.exe' with 'pwsh.exe' to avoid the 'Image|endswith' match while maintaining the same benign test intent.

output: powershell.exe -Command "Get-ADUser -Filter * | Select Name, SamAccountName | Out-File C:\Lab\out\users.txt"
explanation: Insertion: Added quotes and the '-Command' parameter to encapsulate the entire command, which may avoid string-based detection by altering the parsing structure.
